ddls:
CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the photo (e.g., citizen scientist, researcher) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the photo */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the photo location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the photo location */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the location coordinates */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the photo was taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the photo was taken */,
  "datetaken_doy" INTEGER /* Day of the year the photo was taken */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the photo was taken */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the photo was taken */,
  "daymet_sdd" INTEGER /* Daytime solar declination angle */,
  "daymet_dl" INTEGER /* Day length */,
  "daymet_spring_t" REAL /* Spring temperature */,
  "gs_start" INTEGER /* Start of the growing season */,
  "gs_end" INTEGER /* End of the growing season */,
  "gap_lc_code" INTEGER /* Land cover code */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation in meters */,
  "is_useful_pheno" INTEGER /* Indicates if the photo is useful for phenological analysis */,
  "has_flower" INTEGER /* Indicates if the photo shows flowering */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "camera_model" TEXT /* Model of the camera used to capture the photo */,
  "iso" INTEGER /* ISO setting of the camera */,
  "shutter_speed" TEXT /* Shutter speed of the photo */,
  "aperture" TEXT /* Aperture setting of the photo */,
  "focal_length" TEXT /* Focal length of the camera lens */,
  "flash_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if a flash was used */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, RAW) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the photo capture (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover in the sky */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the photo capture */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during the photo capture */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the photo capture */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the photo record */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the photo (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_owner FOREIGN KEY ("owner") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., Santa Catalina Mountains, Crater Lake) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "elevation_range" TEXT /* Range of elevations at the site */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., forest, grassland, wetland) */,
  "protected_status" TEXT /* Protection status of the site (e.g., national park, private land) */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last ecological survey at the site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner (e.g., citizen scientist, researcher) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the owner is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the owner joined the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the owner (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the owner was last active in the system */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenological_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenological indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the phenological indicator (e.g., flowering, leafing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phenological indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the phenological indicator (e.g., floral, foliar, fruiting) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the phenological indicator (e.g., flowering, leafing, fruiting) */,
  "reference_image" TEXT /* URL to a reference image for the indicator */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "photo_id" TEXT /* ID of the photo */,
  "daymet_sdd" INTEGER /* Daytime solar declination angle */,
  "daymet_dl" INTEGER /* Day length */,
  "daymet_spring_t" REAL /* Spring temperature */,
  "gs_start" INTEGER /* Start of the growing season */,
  "gs_end" INTEGER /* End of the growing season */,
  "gap_lc_code" INTEGER /* Land cover code */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation in meters */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount during the photo capture */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level during the photo capture */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index during the photo capture */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the photo capture */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index during the photo capture */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility during the photo capture */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the environmental conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last active in the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "photo_id" TEXT /* ID of the photo being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the photo */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the photo was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "photo_id" TEXT /* ID of the photo being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user adding the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., text, tag, comment) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the annotation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photo_phenology" (
  "photo_id" TEXT /* ID of the photo */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenological indicator */,
  "is_present" INTEGER /* Indicates if the indicator is present in the photo */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the presence of the phenological indicator */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the phenological observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id", "indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photo_environment" (
  "photo_id" TEXT /* ID of the photo */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition record */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the environmental conditions */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the environmental conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id", "condition_id")
)
